ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Stecher for Dianne Phinney and Joan Gifford (Petitioners/Executors).

Mr. Stecher stated that it wasn't a formal will that was executed by the Decedent in 1990, that they now know that the list with names was placed on the will at least 14 years after execution, that it was undated and unsigned, and that according to California law the list should be considered invalid. In addition, Mr. Stecher stated that there is no legal argument that could be presented by anybody therefore notice is not required and that those Parties were non existing at the time execution of the will. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
